nodes.name: The Ashen Gate
nodes.description: The settlement gate hangs open. Something has dragged the warning bell underground.

nodes.name: Shallow Ore Gallery
nodes.description: A workable vein remains beneath the soot.

nodes.name: The Hollow Crew
nodes.description: Dead miners repeat their final shift.

nodes.name: Collapsed Timber Store
nodes.description: Dry supports can be salvaged for the refuge.

nodes.name: Sealed Shrine
nodes.description: A side tunnel bears an old occult seal. Entering promises treasure and danger.

nodes.name: Survivor's Camp
nodes.description: An abandoned camp offers a moment to recover before the overseer's chamber.

nodes.name: Overseer's Chamber
nodes.description: The corrupted overseer guards the heart of the mine.
